returns._0: True if the label can be registered.

initialize(address,address,address,addre.details: Validates commitment window bounds and wires dependencies.

params.factory: Store factory used to resolve/deploy per-user stores.
params.registrar: Base registrar used for ERC721 minting.
params.registry: Forward registry storing node ownership and resolver.
params.reverse: Reverse resolver for primary name mapping.
params.rules: PoP rules used for eligibility and pricing.

returns._0: True if the address is whitelisted.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

register((string,address,bytes32,bool)).details: Registration parameters must match the committed values.

registerReserved((string,address,bytes32.details: Registration parameters must match the committed values.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

params.whiteListStatus: True to add to whitelist, false to remove.

MAX_ALLOWED_COMMITMENT_AGE().notice: Upper bound for commitment validity to cap storage griefing risk.

available(string).notice: Returns whether a label is available for registration.

commit(bytes32).notice: Submits a commitment for a future registration.

commitments(bytes32).notice: Stores Mapping of commitment hashes to timestamp committed.

dotnsRegistrar().notice: Base registrar responsible for minting name ownership.

dotnsRegistry().notice: Forward registry storing node ownership and resolver.

isWhiteListed(address).notice: Checks if the given address is whitelisted to call `registerReserved`.

makeCommitment((string,address,bytes32,b.notice: Computes the commitment hash for a registration.

maxCommitmentAge().notice: Maximum age after which a commitment expires.

minCommitmentAge().notice: Minimum age a commitment must reach before reveal.

popRules().notice: Rules enforcing PoP rules and pricing.

register((string,address,bytes32,bool)).notice: Registers a name after the commitment delay.

registerReserved((string,address,bytes32.notice: Registers a name after the commitment delay.

reverseResolver().notice: Reverse resolver for address → primary name mapping.

whiteList(address).notice: Whitelist for addresses allowed to call `registerReserved`.

whiteListAddress(address,bool).notice: Adds or removes an address from the whitelist for `registerReserved`.

documentation.text: @notice Namehash of the .dot TLD.
@notice Upper bound for commitment validity to cap storage griefing risk.
@notice Base registrar responsible for minting name ownership.
@notice Forward registry storing node ownership and resolver.
@notice Reverse resolver for address → primary name mapping.
@notice Rules enforcing PoP rules and pricing.
@notice Factory for per-user Store instances.
@notice Minimum age a commitment must reach before reveal.
@notice Maximum age after which a commitment expires.
@notice Stores Mapping of commitment hashes to timestamp committed.
@notice Whitelist for addresses allowed to call `registerReserved`.
@dev Reserved storage space to allow for layout changes in the future.
@notice Restricts calls to the forward registry contract.
@custom:oz-upgrades-unsafe-allow constructor
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistrarController
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistrarController
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistrarController

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string memory,address) view external returns (struct IPopRules.PriceWithMeta memory)

documentation.text: @inheritdoc IDotnsRegistrarController
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistrarController
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistrarController
@inheritdoc IDotnsRegistrarController
@inheritdoc ERC165Upgradeable

@notice Returns implementation version.
 @return versionString Current version string.
@notice Internal check enforcing whitelist-or-owner access.
@notice Internal check enforcing registry-only access.
